post.description:
curl示例：
  curl -X POST "http://api.example.com:port/api/v1/aoes/models_file2" -H "Access-Token: ${TOKEN}" -F "file=@/path/to/file"
python示例：
  token = your-token
  url = "http://api.example.com:port/api/v1/aoes/models_file2"
  files = { "file": open('/path/to/file','rb') }
  headers = { 'Access-Token': token }
  response = requests.request("POST", url, headers=headers, files = files)
